title: Holo Health Indicator
description: Add client-sided, highly customizable, health indicators for entities.
body:
# Holo Health Indicator

A **client-sided** mod that adds mob health visualization with customizable texts. It features selectable display conditions for when indicators appear and a fully customizable text formatting.

To open config for the mod, use the command  ```/healthindicator``` or by using Mod Menu for Fabric or the built in (neo)Forge config menu.

### Features
- **Fully configurable text formatting**
- **Color code support for text**
- **Supports custom mob names**
- **Configurable display conditions:**
  - Always On
  - On Damage
  - On Hover



_If you enjoy this mod, you may also be interested in my other mods in the holo series:_

| **Modrinth**     |**Curseforge**   |
| ------------ |------------ |
|[Holo Damage Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/holo-damage-indicator)|[Holo Damage Indicator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/holo-damage-indicator)| 
|[Holo Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/holo-items)|[Holo Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/holo-items)|


## Showcase

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5298b6f2c86bb9ea95477f90dc5aff84facac50b_0.webp)

### Config

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e264daf260b5b9f7a1d8e8bbe29c8cef50adc3.png)

## Dependencies
### Fabric Dependencies
Mod Menu is optional. All else is required.
| Modrinth | Curseforge |
| -------- | ------- |
| [HologramAPI]([https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/hologram-api)) | [HologramAPI]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hologram-api)) |
| [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) |
| [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)|
| [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) | [Mod Menu](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) |

### (Neo)Forge Dependencies
| Modrinth | Curseforge |
| -------- | ------- |
| [HologramAPI]([https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config](https://modrinth.com/mod/hologram-api)) | [HologramAPI]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hologram-api)) |
| [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) | [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config) |
